title: service-accounts — cache keys + tags
description: SA caches are aggressively short-TTL. Secrets NEVER cached. State (is_enabled, expires_at, signer_kid) is cached for <= 60 seconds so a disable / rotation / expiry propagates fast across the fleet. Rate-limit buckets are per-SA + per-IP with sliding-window semantics. IP + user-agent fingerprint tuples cached rolling 30 days for anomaly detection.

keys.description: Cached ServiceAccount row (redacted — no secret_hash). Read by every request through service_account.verify_jwt. Very short TTL so a disable / rotation propagates fast.
invalidatedBy: explicit invalidate from service-account:rotate + service-account:disable + service-account:delete

keys.description: Cached list of SA ids that share this kid (populated on first hit). Enables efficient batch-revocation when a kid is burned. TTL matches svc:lookup:id.
invalidatedBy: signer_kid change on any SA sharing the kid

keys.description: JWT deny-list. Populated by admin actions (revoke a specific in-flight JWT) OR by SA disable events (all outstanding JWTs' jti are added). TTL matches the JWT's remaining `exp`.
keys.notes: Composed with auth::JwtDenyList — the storage layer is shared. The service_account.verify_jwt middleware consults this cache after signature verification but before SA lookup.

keys.description: Per-SA rate limit on the token-exchange endpoint. 5 attempts per minute per SA-ID.
Per-IP rate limit on the token-exchange endpoint. 20 attempts per minute per /24. Prevents credential-stuffing attacks across the SA namespace.

Rolling 30-day set of (ip_prefix_24, user_agent_hash) tuples observed for this SA. Populated by service_account.audit middleware. Consumed by ServiceAccountFingerprinter to detect novel tuples during rate-spike events.
keys.notes: Uses Redis SortedSet with the observation timestamp as the score — O(log N) insert + O(log N + M) trim to the 30-day window.

keys.description: Rolling per-hour request-rate baseline for this SA. Feeds the ServiceAccountFingerprinter's rate-spike detection. Populated by the audit middleware; refreshed via exponential-decay averaging.

Coalesced buffer for last_used_at + last_used_ip writes. Populated by the audit middleware; flushed to Postgres by UpdateLastUsedTimestampJob every 30 seconds. Reduces write pressure on the SA table under high-volume machine traffic.
Denormalised gauge feeding the `academorix.service_account.active_count` metric. Refreshed by a scheduled task every 60s.
Denormalised gauge for SAs within the 14-day rotation-due window. Refreshed hourly by the NotifyRotationDueJob's pre-scan phase.
Denormalised gauge for SAs whose last_used_at is older than the dormant threshold. Refreshed weekly by DetectDormantServiceAccountJob.

never_cached: JWT plaintext / decoded payload beyond the jti
jwt_signing_keys.secret_material (the HS256 shared secret; owned + cached by identity/auth's own key cache)
